yar ap na jo base.html di ha is pa sab cheeza bohot choti nazar a rahi ha theek sa theek bi nahi rahi pahla to asa nahi tha
base.html
<!-- templates/base.html --> <!DOCTYPE html> <html lang="en" data-bs-theme="{{ session.get('theme', 'light') }}" data-theme="default"> <head> <meta charset="UTF-8"> <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"> <title>{% block title %}PRIMEACCESS - Mobile Accessories & Photocopy Shop{% endblock %}</title> <!-- Bootstrap 5 --> <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.0/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet"> <!-- Font Awesome 6 --> <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css"> <!-- DataTables --> <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.datatables.net/1.13.6/css/dataTables.bootstrap5.min.css"> <!-- Chart.js --> <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js"></script> <!-- SweetAlert2 --> <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/sweetalert2@11"></script> <style> /* ============================================ */ /* PRIMEACCESS - COMPLETE STYLES v3.0 */ /* ============================================ */ @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800;900&display=swap'); /* ========== ROOT VARIABLES ========== */ :root { --brand-primary: #2563EB; --brand-secondary: #1E40AF; --brand-accent: #60A5FA; --brand-gradient: linear-gradient(135deg, #2563EB, #1E40AF); --brand-gradient-hover: linear-gradient(135deg, #1D4ED8, #1E3A8A); --sidebar-width: 260px; --header-height: 64px; --radius-sm: 8px; --radius-md: 12px; --radius-lg: 20px; --radius-xl: 28px; --transition-fast: 0.2s ease; --transition-normal: 0.3s ease; --transition-slow: 0.5s ease; --shadow-sm: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04); --shadow-md: 0 4px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08); --shadow-lg: 0 8px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12); --shadow-xl: 0 16px 60px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.16); --glass-bg: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); --glass-border: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12); --glass-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08); } /* ========== THEME COLORS ========== */ [data-bs-theme="light"] { --bg-body: #F0F4FA; --bg-card: #FFFFFF; --bg-card-hover: #F5F8FC; --bg-input: #FFFFFF; --bg-navbar: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.92); --text-primary: #1A2332; --text-secondary: #4A5A72; --text-muted: #8A9AAA; --border-color: #E4EAF2; --border-light: #F0F4FA; --shadow-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04); --shadow-color-hover: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08); --glass-bg: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6); --glass-border: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8); --sidebar-bg: linear-gradient(180deg, #E8F0FE 0%, #D4E4FC 50%, #B8D4F8 100%); --sidebar-text: rgba(26, 42, 58, 0.60); --sidebar-text-hover: #1A2A3A; --sidebar-text-active: #1A2A3A; --sidebar-border: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06); --sidebar-active-bg: rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.10); --sidebar-icon: rgba(26, 42, 58, 0.30); --sidebar-icon-active: #2563EB; } [data-bs-theme="dark"] { --bg-body: #080E1A; --bg-card: #101C2E; --bg-card-hover: #182A40; --bg-input: #101C2E; --bg-navbar: rgba(8, 14, 26, 0.95); --text-primary: #E8F0F8; --text-secondary: #A0B0C0; --text-muted: #607080; --border-color: #1A2A3E; --shadow-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2); --shadow-color-hover: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4); --glass-bg: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04); --glass-border: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06); --sidebar-bg: linear-gradient(180deg, #0A1628 0%, #162D50 50%, #1A3A6E 100%); --sidebar-text: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.45); --sidebar-text-hover: #FFFFFF; --sidebar-text-active: #FFFFFF; --sidebar-border: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); --sidebar-active-bg: rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.12); --sidebar-icon: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25); --sidebar-icon-active: #60A5FA; } /* ========== THEME OPTIONS - 5 COLORS ========== */ [data-theme="default"] { --brand-primary: #2563EB; --brand-secondary: #1E40AF; --brand-gradient: linear-gradient(135deg, #2563EB, #1E40AF); --brand-accent: #60A5FA; } [data-theme="purple"] { --brand-primary: #7C3AED; --brand-secondary: #5B21B6; --brand-gradient: linear-gradient(135deg, #7C3AED, #5B21B6); --brand-accent: #A78BFA; } [data-theme="slate"] { --brand-primary: #475569; --brand-secondary: #334155; --brand-gradient: linear-gradient(135deg, #475569, #334155); --brand-accent: #94A3B8; } [data-theme="white"] { --brand-primary: #F8FAFC; --brand-secondary: #E2E8F0; --brand-gradient: linear-gradient(135deg, #F8FAFC, #E2E8F0); --brand-accent: #CBD5E1; } [data-theme="black"] { --brand-primary: #0F172A; --brand-secondary: #1E293B; --brand-gradient: linear-gradient(135deg, #0F172A, #1E293B); --brand-accent: #334155; } /* ========== BASE STYLES ========== */ * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; } html { font-size: 14px; scroll-behavior: smooth; } body { font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; background-color: var(--bg-body); color: var(--text-primary); transition: background-color var(--transition-normal), color var(--transition-normal); -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; overflow-x: hidden; } /* ========== SCROLLBAR ========== */ ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 4px; height: 4px; } ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: var(--bg-body); } ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--brand-primary); border-radius: 10px; } ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover { background: var(--brand-secondary); } /* ========== SIDEBAR ========== */ .sidebar { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: var(--sidebar-width); height: 100vh; background: var(--sidebar-bg); border-right: 1px solid var(--sidebar-border); z-index: 1050; overflow-y: auto; transition: all var(--transition-normal); box-shadow: 4px 0 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08); } .sidebar::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 3px; } .sidebar::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); } .sidebar::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--brand-gradient); border-radius: 10px; } .sidebar-brand { padding: 18px 20px 14px; text-align: center; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--sidebar-border); position: relative; } .sidebar-brand::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: -1px; left: 20%; width: 60%; height: 2px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.3), transparent); } .sidebar-brand .brand-logo-wrapper { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 12px; } .sidebar-brand .brand-logo { width: 100px; height: 100px; border-radius: var(--radius-md); background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; padding: 4px; border: 1.5px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.10); transition: all var(--transition-normal); box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.15); overflow: hidden; } .sidebar-brand .brand-logo img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: contain; border-radius: 8px; } .sidebar-brand .brand-logo:hover { transform: scale(1.08) rotate(-3deg); border-color: rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.4); box-shadow: 0 6px 30px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.3); } .sidebar-brand .brand-title { font-weight: 800; font-size: 1.05rem; letter-spacing: -0.3px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FFFFFF 0%, #93C5FD 100%); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; text-shadow: 0 0 40px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.1); } [data-bs-theme="light"] .sidebar-brand .brand-title { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1A2A3A, #4A6A8A); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; } .sidebar-brand .brand-subtitle { color: var(--sidebar-text); font-size: 0.5rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase; opacity: 0.6; } .sidebar-brand .brand-tagline { color: var(--sidebar-text); font-size: 0.45rem; margin-top: 2px; letter-spacing: 0.8px; opacity: 0.4; } .sidebar-search { padding: 12px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--sidebar-border); position: relative; } .sidebar-search input { width: 100%; padding: 8px 12px 8px 36px; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06); color: var(--text-primary); font-size: 0.7rem; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; transition: all var(--transition-fast); backdrop-filter: blur(4px); } .sidebar-search input::placeholder { color: var(--text-muted); opacity: 0.4; } .sidebar-search input:focus { outline: none; border-color: rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.4); background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.10); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.08); } .sidebar-search .search-icon { position: absolute; left: 28px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); color: var(--text-muted); opacity: 0.4; font-size: 0.7rem; } .sidebar-menu { padding: 8px 0 16px; } .sidebar-menu .menu-label { color: var(--sidebar-text); font-size: 0.55rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1.8px; padding: 14px 20px 6px; font-weight: 700; opacity: 0.4; } .sidebar-menu .nav-item { margin: 2px 10px; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); transition: all var(--transition-fast); } .sidebar-menu .nav-item.active .nav-link { background: var(--sidebar-active-bg); color: var(--sidebar-text-active); box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.10); position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .sidebar-menu .nav-item.active .nav-link::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 3px; height: 100%; background: var(--brand-gradient); border-radius: 0 3px 3px 0; animation: borderGlow 2s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes borderGlow { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.3; } } .sidebar-menu .nav-item.active .nav-link i { color: var(--sidebar-icon-active); } .sidebar-menu .nav-item:hover .nav-link:not(.active) { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06); color: var(--sidebar-text-hover); transform: translateX(4px); } .sidebar-menu .nav-item:hover .nav-link:not(.active) i { color: var(--sidebar-icon-active); } .sidebar-menu .nav-link { color: var(--sidebar-text); padding: 9px 14px; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); transition: all var(--transition-fast); display: flex; align-items: center; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.75rem; gap: 10px; position: relative; border: 1px solid transparent; } .sidebar-menu .nav-link i { width: 18px; text-align: center; font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--sidebar-icon); transition: color var(--transition-fast); } .sidebar-menu .nav-link .badge { margin-left: auto; background: var(--brand-gradient); color: white; font-size: 0.5rem; padding: 1px 8px; border-radius: 20px; font-weight: 600; box-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.2); } .sidebar-menu .nav-item.has-sub { cursor: pointer; } .sidebar-menu .nav-item.has-sub .sub-menu { max-height: 0; overflow: hidden; transition: max-height var(--transition-slow); } .sidebar-menu .nav-item.has-sub.open .sub-menu { max-height: 500px; } .sidebar-menu .nav-item.has-sub .nav-link .arrow { margin-left: auto; transition: transform var(--transition-fast); font-size: 0.6rem; } .sidebar-menu .nav-item.has-sub.open .nav-link .arrow { transform: rotate(180deg); } .sidebar-menu .sub-menu .nav-link { padding-left: 42px; font-size: 0.7rem; color: var(--sidebar-text); opacity: 0.7; } .sidebar-menu .sub-menu .nav-link:hover { opacity: 1; color: var(--sidebar-text-hover); } .sidebar-menu .sub-menu .nav-link i { font-size: 0.7rem; opacity: 0.5; } .main-content { margin-left: var(--sidebar-width); min-height: 100vh; transition: margin-left var(--transition-normal); } .page-content { padding: 20px 24px; animation: pageFadeIn 0.5s ease forwards; } @keyframes pageFadeIn { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } } #progressBar { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 0%; height: 3px; background: var(--brand-gradient); z-index: 99999; transition: width 0.3s ease; box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.3); } .top-navbar { background: var(--bg-navbar); backdrop-filter: blur(16px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px); padding: 0 20px; height: var(--header-height); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color); position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 1040; transition: all var(--transition-normal); } .top-navbar .navbar-toggle { display: none; background: none; border: none; color: var(--text-primary); font-size: 1.3rem; padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); } .top-navbar .navbar-toggle:hover { background: var(--bg-card-hover); } @media (max-width: 1200px) { .top-navbar .navbar-toggle { display: block !important; } } .top-navbar .search-box { position: relative; flex: 1; max-width: 400px; } .top-navbar .search-box input { width: 100%; padding: 8px 16px 8px 38px; border-radius: 50px; border: 1.5px solid var(--border-color); background: var(--bg-input); color: var(--text-primary); font-size: 0.75rem; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; transition: all var(--transition-fast); } .top-navbar .search-box input:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--brand-primary); box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.06); } .top-navbar .search-box input::placeholder { color: var(--text-muted); } .top-navbar .search-box i { position: absolute; left: 14px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 0.75rem; } .live-clock { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 4px 14px; border-radius: 50px; background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border-color); color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; transition: all var(--transition-fast); } .live-clock i { color: var(--brand-primary); font-size: 0.8rem; } .live-clock .clock-date { font-size: 0.6rem; opacity: 0.5; } .live-clock:hover { border-color: var(--brand-primary); box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.06); } .top-navbar .navbar-actions { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; } .top-navbar .navbar-actions .action-btn { position: relative; width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border-color); color: var(--text-secondary); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; transition: all var(--transition-fast); cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.8rem; } .top-navbar .navbar-actions .action-btn:hover { background: var(--brand-gradient); color: white; border-color: transparent; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.25); } .top-navbar .navbar-actions .action-btn .badge-dot { position: absolute; top: -2px; right: -2px; width: 16px; height: 16px; border-radius: 50%; background: #E11D48; color: white; font-size: 0.45rem; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border: 2px solid var(--bg-navbar); font-weight: 700; } .top-navbar .user-profile { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 2px 12px 2px 2px; border-radius: 50px; background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border-color); cursor: pointer; transition: all var(--transition-fast); text-decoration: none; color: var(--text-primary); } .top-navbar .user-profile:hover { background: var(--brand-gradient); color: white; border-color: transparent; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.2); } .top-navbar .user-profile img { width: 30px; height: 30px; border-radius: 50%; object-fit: cover; border: 2px solid transparent; } .top-navbar .user-profile:hover img { border-color: white; } .top-navbar .user-profile .user-info .name { font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.7rem; } .top-navbar .user-profile .user-info .role { font-size: 0.5rem; opacity: 0.5; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; } .theme-toggle { position: relative; width: 42px; height: 22px; background: var(--bg-card); border: 1.5px solid var(--border-color); border-radius: 50px; cursor: pointer; transition: all var(--transition-fast); display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px; flex-shrink: 0; } .theme-toggle:hover { border-color: var(--brand-primary); } .theme-toggle .toggle-thumb { width: 16px; height: 16px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--brand-gradient); transition: all var(--transition-normal); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 0.5rem; color: white; } .theme-toggle.dark .toggle-thumb { transform: translateX(20px); background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FBBF24, #F59E0B); } .page-header { margin-bottom: 20px; } .page-header h1 { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: -0.5px; } .page-header h1 i { color: var(--brand-primary); margin-right: 8px; } .page-header .breadcrumb { background: none; padding: 4px 0 0; margin: 0; font-size: 0.7rem; } .page-header .breadcrumb-item a { color: var(--brand-primary); text-decoration: none; font-weight: 500; } .card { border: none; border-radius: var(--radius-md); background: var(--bg-card); box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm); transition: all var(--transition-normal); overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid var(--border-color); } .card:hover { box-shadow: var(--shadow-md); transform: translateY(-3px); } .card .card-header { background: none; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color); padding: 14px 18px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.8rem; } .card .card-body { padding: 18px 20px; } .card-3d { transition: transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1), box-shadow 0.4s ease; perspective: 1000px; transform-style: preserve-3d; position: relative; } .card-3d:hover { transform: translateY(-8px) rotateX(2deg) rotateY(2deg) scale(1.02); box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.15), 0 0 80px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.05); } .card-3d::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: -2px; left: -2px; right: -2px; bottom: -2px; background: var(--brand-gradient); border-radius: var(--radius-md); z-index: -1; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.4s ease; } .card-3d:hover::before { opacity: 0.15; } .glass-card { background: var(--glass-bg); backdrop-filter: blur(16px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px); border: 1px solid var(--glass-border); border-radius: var(--radius-md); box-shadow: var(--glass-shadow); } .glass-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 8px 40px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.08), var(--glass-shadow); } .stat-card { border-radius: var(--radius-md); padding: 18px 20px; background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border-color); transition: all var(--transition-normal); cursor: default; position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .stat-card::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 4px; height: 100%; background: var(--brand-gradient); border-radius: 0 4px 4px 0; } .stat-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: var(--shadow-md); } .stat-card .stat-icon { width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 1.1rem; margin-bottom: 8px; background: var(--brand-gradient); color: white; } .stat-card .stat-number { font-size: 1.6rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: -0.5px; margin: 2px 0; } .stat-card .stat-label { font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-muted); } .stat-card small { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 0.6rem; } .stat-card.blue .stat-icon { background: #2563EB; } .stat-card.green .stat-icon { background: #0D9488; } .stat-card.orange .stat-icon { background: #D97706; } .stat-card.red .stat-icon { background: #E11D48; } .stat-card.purple .stat-icon { background: #7C3AED; } .table-container { background: var(--bg-card); border-radius: var(--radius-md); overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid var(--border-color); } .table { margin-bottom: 0; color: var(--text-primary); } .table thead th { background: var(--bg-card-hover); border-bottom: 2px solid var(--border-color); font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.6rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.8px; padding: 10px 14px; color: var(--text-muted); } .table tbody td { padding: 8px 14px; vertical-align: middle; border-color: var(--border-color); font-size: 0.75rem; } .table tbody tr { transition: all var(--transition-fast); } .table tbody tr:hover { background: var(--bg-card-hover); cursor: pointer; } .badge-status { padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 50px; font-size: 0.6rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.3px; display: inline-block; } .badge-status.paid, .badge-status.completed { background: rgba(13, 148, 136, 0.12); color: #0D9488; } .badge-status.pending { background: rgba(217, 119, 6, 0.12); color: #D97706; } .badge-status.due { background: rgba(225, 29, 72, 0.12); color: #E11D48; } .badge-status.low-stock { background: rgba(225, 29, 72, 0.12); color: #E11D48; animation: pulse-badge 2s infinite; } @keyframes pulse-badge { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.5; } } .form-control, .form-select { background: var(--bg-input); color: var(--text-primary); border: 1.5px solid var(--border-color); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); padding: 8px 14px; transition: all var(--transition-fast); font-size: 0.75rem; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; } .form-control:focus, .form-select:focus { border-color: var(--brand-primary); box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.06); } .form-control::placeholder { color: var(--text-muted); opacity: 0.5; } .form-label { font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.7rem; color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 4px; } .btn-neon { background: var(--brand-gradient); color: white; box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.2); border: none; transition: all var(--transition-fast); } .btn-neon:hover { box-shadow: 0 0 40px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.4), 0 0 80px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.15); transform: translateY(-2px) scale(1.02); color: white; } .btn { border-radius: var(--radius-sm); padding: 8px 20px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.75rem; transition: all var(--transition-fast); font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.2px; border: none; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; } .btn:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); } .btn-primary { background: var(--brand-gradient); color: white; } .btn-primary:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.3); color: white; } .btn-success { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0D9488, #0F766E); color: white; } .btn-success:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(13, 148, 136, 0.3); color: white; } .btn-danger { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #E11D48, #BE123C); color: white; } .btn-danger:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(225, 29, 72, 0.3); color: white; } .btn-warning { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #D97706, #B45309); color: white; } .btn-warning:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(217, 119, 6, 0.3); color: white; } .toast-container { position: fixed; top: 20px; right: 20px; z-index: 9999; max-width: 380px; width: 100%; } .toast-custom { background: var(--bg-card); color: var(--text-primary); border: 1px solid var(--border-color); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); padding: 12px 16px; margin-bottom: 8px; box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg); animation: slideInRight 0.4s ease; border-left: 3px solid var(--brand-primary); font-size: 0.75rem; position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .toast-custom .toast-progress { position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; height: 2px; background: var(--brand-gradient); animation: shrink 5s linear forwards; } @keyframes shrink { from { width: 100%; } to { width: 0%; } } @keyframes slideInRight { from { transform: translateX(120%); opacity: 0; } to { transform: translateX(0); opacity: 1; } } .fab-container { position: fixed; bottom: 30px; right: 30px; z-index: 1030; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 10px; } .fab-container .fab { width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--brand-gradient); color: white; border: none; box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.3); cursor: pointer; transition: all var(--transition-normal); font-size: 1.2rem; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .fab-container .fab:hover { transform: scale(1.1) rotate(90deg); box-shadow: 0 6px 30px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.4); } .fab-container .fab-actions { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.8); transition: all var(--transition-normal); pointer-events: none; } .fab-container.open .fab-actions { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); pointer-events: all; } .fab-container .fab-actions .fab-item { width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 50%; border: none; color: white; cursor: pointer; transition: all var(--transition-fast); font-size: 0.9rem; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; box-shadow: var(--shadow-md); } .fab-container .fab-actions .fab-item:hover { transform: scale(1.1); } .page-loader { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; background: var(--bg-body); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; z-index: 9999; transition: opacity 0.6s ease, visibility 0.6s ease; } .page-loader.hidden { opacity: 0; visibility: hidden; } .loader-spinner { width: 50px; height: 50px; border: 4px solid var(--border-color); border-top-color: var(--brand-primary); border-radius: 50%; animation: spin 1s linear infinite; } @keyframes spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } } .activity-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 8px 14px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color); transition: background var(--transition-fast); } .activity-item:hover { background: var(--bg-card-hover); } .activity-item .activity-icon { width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; font-size: 0.7rem; color: white; } .activity-item .activity-icon.sale { background: #2563EB; } .activity-item .activity-icon.customer { background: #0D9488; } .activity-item .activity-icon.copy { background: #7C3AED; } .activity-item .activity-icon.expense { background: #D97706; } .activity-item .activity-content { flex: 1; min-width: 0; } .activity-item .activity-text { margin: 0; font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--text-primary); } .activity-item .activity-time { font-size: 0.6rem; color: var(--text-muted); } .top-customer-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 8px 14px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color); transition: background var(--transition-fast); } .top-customer-item:hover { background: var(--bg-card-hover); } .top-customer-item .rank { width: 24px; height: 24px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--bg-card-hover); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 0.6rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-muted); flex-shrink: 0; } .top-customer-item .rank.rank-1 { background: #FBBF24; color: #fff; } .top-customer-item .rank.rank-2 { background: #94A3B8; color: #fff; } .top-customer-item .rank.rank-3 { background: #CD7F32; color: #fff; } .top-customer-item .avatar { width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 50%; object-fit: cover; flex-shrink: 0; } .top-customer-item .info { flex: 1; min-width: 0; } .top-customer-item .info .name { font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-primary); } .top-customer-item .info .purchases { font-size: 0.6rem; color: var(--text-muted); } .top-customer-item .amount { font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--brand-primary); } /* ========== THEME SELECTOR - 5 COLORS ========== */ .theme-selector { display: flex; gap: 8px; padding: 4px 0; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center; } .theme-selector .theme-option { width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 50%; border: 2px solid var(--border-color); cursor: pointer; transition: all var(--transition-fast); padding: 0; flex-shrink: 0; } .theme-selector .theme-option:hover { transform: scale(1.15); box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15); } .theme-selector .theme-option.active { border-color: #FFFFFF !important; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3), 0 0 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2); transform: scale(1.1); } .theme-selector .theme-option.theme-default { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2563EB, #1E40AF); } .theme-selector .theme-option.theme-purple { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #7C3AED, #5B21B6); } .theme-selector .theme-option.theme-slate { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #475569, #334155); } .theme-selector .theme-option.theme-white { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #F8FAFC, #E2E8F0); } .theme-selector .theme-option.theme-black { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0F172A, #1E293B); } .tooltip-custom { position: fixed; background: var(--bg-card); color: var(--text-primary); padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 0.7rem; border: 1px solid var(--border-color); box-shadow: var(--shadow-md); z-index: 9999; pointer-events: none; transition: opacity 0.2s; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; } #particlesCanvas { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; z-index: -1; pointer-events: none; } @keyframes fadeInUp { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } } @keyframes fadeIn { from { opacity: 0; } to { opacity: 1; } } @keyframes slideUp { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } } .animate-fade-in { animation: fadeIn 0.6s ease forwards; } .animate-fade-in-up { animation: fadeInUp 0.6s ease forwards; } .animate-slide-up { animation: slideUp 0.6s ease forwards; } .stagger > * { opacity: 0; animation: fadeInUp 0.6s ease forwards; } .stagger > *:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: 0.05s; } .stagger > *:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.10s; } .stagger > *:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.15s; } .stagger > *:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: 0.20s; } .stagger > *:nth-child(5) { animation-delay: 0.25s; } .stagger > *:nth-child(6) { animation-delay: 0.30s; } .hover-lift { transition: transform var(--transition-normal), box-shadow var(--transition-normal); } .hover-lift:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg); } .hover-scale { transition: transform var(--transition-fast); } .hover-scale:hover { transform: scale(1.03); } .hover-glow { transition: box-shadow var(--transition-fast); } .hover-glow:hover { box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.08); } [data-bs-theme="dark"] .sidebar { background: linear-gradient(180deg, #0A1628 0%, #162D50 50%, #1A3A6E 100%); } [data-bs-theme="dark"] .sidebar-brand .brand-title { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FFFFFF, #93C5FD); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; } [data-bs-theme="dark"] .stat-card:not(.blue):not(.green):not(.orange):not(.red):not(.purple) { background: var(--bg-card); } [data-bs-theme="dark"] .stat-card:not(.blue):not(.green):not(.orange):not(.red):not(.purple) .stat-number, [data-bs-theme="dark"] .stat-card:not(.blue):not(.green):not(.orange):not(.red):not(.purple) .stat-label, [data-bs-theme="dark"] .stat-card:not(.blue):not(.green):not(.orange):not(.red):not(.purple) small { color: var(--text-primary); } [data-bs-theme="dark"] .stat-card:not(.blue):not(.green):not(.orange):not(.red):not(.purple) .stat-icon { background: var(--bg-card-hover); color: var(--brand-primary); } @media (max-width: 1200px) { .sidebar { transform: translateX(-100%); } .sidebar.show { transform: translateX(0); } .main-content { margin-left: 0; } } @media (max-width: 992px) { .top-navbar { padding: 0 14px; } .top-navbar .search-box { max-width: 180px; } .top-navbar .user-profile .user-info { display: none; } .page-content { padding: 14px 16px; } .stat-card .stat-number { font-size: 1.3rem; } } @media (max-width: 768px) { .top-navbar .search-box { display: none; } .top-navbar .navbar-actions .action-btn { width: 32px; height: 32px; } .top-navbar .live-clock { display: none; } .page-content { padding: 10px 12px; } .stat-card { padding: 14px 16px; } .stat-card .stat-number { font-size: 1.1rem; } .fab-container { bottom: 16px; right: 16px; } .fab-container .fab { width: 48px; height: 48px; font-size: 1rem; } } @media print { .sidebar, .top-navbar, .fab-container, .no-print, #particlesCanvas { display: none !important; } .main-content { margin-left: 0 !important; } .page-content { padding: 20px !important; } .card { box-shadow: none !important; border: 1px solid #ddd !important; break-inside: avoid; } } </style> {% block extra_css %}{% endblock %} </head> <body> <!-- ===== PROGRESS BAR ===== --> <div id="progressBar"></div> <!-- ===== PAGE LOADER ===== --> <div class="page-loader" id="pageLoader"> <div class="loader-spinner"></div> </div> <!-- ===== PARTICLES BACKGROUND ===== --> <canvas id="particlesCanvas"></canvas> <!-- ===== SIDEBAR ===== --> <nav class="sidebar" id="sidebar"> <div class="sidebar-brand"> <div class="brand-logo-wrapper"> <!-- ===== LOGO - JAVASCRIPT CONTROL KAREGA ===== --> <div class="brand-logo"> <img id="sidebarLogo" src="{{ url_for('static', filename='img/logo1.png') }}" alt="PrimeAccess Logo" style="width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: contain; border-radius: 8px;"> </div> <div class="brand-name"> <span class="brand-title">PRIMEACCESS</span> <span class="brand-subtitle">Premium Accessories</span> </div> </div> <div class="brand-tagline">Mobile &amp; Computer Accessories</div> </div> <!-- Sidebar Search --> <div class="sidebar-search" style="position: relative; padding: 10px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);"> <i class="fas fa-search search-icon" style="position: absolute; left: 28px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 0.7rem;"></i> <input type="text" id="sidebarSearch" placeholder="Search menu..." style="width: 100%; padding: 7px 12px 7px 36px; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); border: 1px solid var(--border-color); background: var(--bg-input); color: var(--text-primary); font-size: 0.7rem; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; transition: all var(--transition-fast);"> </div> <!-- Sidebar Menu --> <div class="sidebar-menu"> <div class="menu-label">Main</div> <div class="nav-item {% if request.endpoint == 'dashboard' %}active{% endif %}"> <a class="nav-link" href="{{ url_for('dashboard') }}"> <i class="fas fa-chart-pie"></i> <span>Dashboard</span> </a> </div> <div class="menu-label">Sales &amp; Inventory</div> <div class="nav-item {% if request.endpoint in ['products', 'add_product', 'update_product'] %}active{% endif %}"> <a class="nav-link" href="{{ url_for('products') }}"> <i class="fas fa-box"></i> <span>Products</span> <span class="badge bg-primary">0</span> </a> </div> <div class="nav-item {% if request.endpoint == 'new_sale' %}active{% endif %}"> <a class="nav-link" href="{{ url_for('new_sale') }}"> <i class="fas fa-cart-plus"></i> <span>New Sale</span> </a> </div> <div class="nav-item {% if request.endpoint == 'sales' %}active{% endif %}"> <a class="nav-link" href="{{ url_for('sales') }}"> <i class="fas fa-receipt"></i> <span>Sales History</span> </a> </div> <div class="nav-item {% if request.endpoint == 'new_purchase' %}active{% endif %}"> <a class="nav-link" href="{{ url_for('new_purchase') }}"> <i class="fas fa-truck"></i> <span>New Purchase</span> </a> </div> <div class="nav-item {% if request.endpoint == 'purchases' %}active{% endif %}"> <a class="nav-link" href="{{ url_for('purchases') }}"> <i class="fas fa-file-invoice"></i> <span>Purchase History</span> </a> </div> <div class="menu-label">Photocopy</div> <div class="nav-item {% if request.endpoint == 'new_photocopy' %}active{% endif %}"> <a class="nav-link" href="{{ url_for('new_photocopy') }}"> <i class="fas fa-copy"></i> <span>New Photocopy</span> </a> </div> <div class="nav-item {% if request.endpoint == 'photocopy' %}active{% endif %}"> <a class="nav-link" href="{{ url_for('photocopy') }}"> <i class="fas fa-print"></i> <span>Photocopy Jobs</span> </a> </div> <div class="menu-label">People</div> <div class="nav-item {% if request.endpoint == 'customers' %}active{% endif %}"> <a class="nav-link" href="{{ url_for('customers') }}"> <i class="fas fa-users"></i> <span>Customers</span> </a> </div> <div class="nav-item {% if request.endpoint == 'suppliers' %}active{% endif %}"> <a class="nav-link" href="{{ url_for('suppliers') }}"> <i class="fas fa-handshake"></i> <span>Suppliers</span> </a> </div> <div class="menu-label">Finance</div> <div class="nav-item {% if request.endpoint == 'expenses' %}active{% endif %}"> <a class="nav-link" href="{{ url_for('expenses') }}"> <i class="fas fa-money-bill-wave"></i> <span>Expenses</span> </a> </div> <div class="nav-item {% if request.endpoint == 'mobile_wallet' %}active{% endif %}"> <a class="nav-link" href="{{ url_for('mobile_wallet') }}"> <i class="fas fa-mobile-alt"></i> <span>Mobile Wallets</span> </a> </div> <div class="nav-item {% if request.endpoint == 'reports' %}active{% endif %}"> <a class="nav-link" href="{{ url_for('reports') }}"> <i class="fas fa-chart-bar"></i> <span>Reports</span> </a> </div> <div class="menu-label">System</div> <div class="nav-item {% if request.endpoint == 'backup' %}active{% endif %}"> <a class="nav-link" href="{{ url_for('backup') }}"> <i class="fas fa-database"></i> <span>Backup</span> </a> </div> <div class="nav-item {% if request.endpoint == 'settings' %}active{% endif %}"> <a class="nav-link" href="{{ url_for('settings') }}"> <i class="fas fa-cog"></i> <span>Settings</span> </a> </div> <div class="nav-item"> <a class="nav-link" href="{{ url_for('logout') }}"> <i class="fas fa-sign-out-alt"></i> <span>Logout</span> </a> </div> </div> </nav> <!-- ===== MAIN CONTENT ===== --> <div class="main-content"> <nav class="top-navbar"> <button class="navbar-toggle" id="sidebarToggle"> <i class="fas fa-bars"></i> </button> <div class="search-box"> <i class="fas fa-search"></i> <input type="text" placeholder="Search products, customers..." id="globalSearch"> </div> <div class="live-clock" id="liveClock"> <i class="fas fa-clock me-1"></i> <span id="clockTime">--:--:--</span> <span class="clock-date" id="clockDate">--/--/----</span> </div> <div class="navbar-actions"> <!-- ===== LANGUAGE TOGGLE ===== --> <div class="dropdown" style="position: relative;"> <button class="action-btn" data-bs-toggle="dropdown" style="border-radius: 50%; width: 36px; height: 36px; border: 1px solid var(--border-color); background: var(--bg-card); color: var(--text-secondary); cursor: pointer; transition: all var(--transition-fast);" title="Language"> <i class="fas fa-globe"></i> </button> <div class="dropdown-menu dropdown-menu-end" style="padding: 8px; min-width: 180px; background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border-color); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);"> <a href="{{ url_for('set_language', lang='en') }}" class="dropdown-item {% if session.get('language') == 'en' or not session.get('language') %}active{% endif %}" style="font-size: 0.85rem;"> <i class="fas fa-flag me-2"></i> English {% if session.get('language') == 'en' or not session.get('language') %} <i class="fas fa-check text-success float-end"></i> {% endif %} </a> <a href="{{ url_for('set_language', lang='ur') }}" class="dropdown-item {% if session.get('language') == 'ur' %}active{% endif %}" style="font-size: 0.85rem;"> <i class="fas fa-flag me-2"></i> اردو (Urdu) {% if session.get('language') == 'ur' %} <i class="fas fa-check text-success float-end"></i> {% endif %} </a> </div> </div> <div class="theme-toggle" id="themeToggle" onclick="toggleTheme()" style="cursor: pointer;"> <div class="toggle-thumb" id="themeThumb"> <i class="fas fa-moon" id="themeIcon"></i> </div> </div> <!-- Theme Selector Dropdown - 5 COLORS --> <div class="dropdown" style="position: relative;"> <button class="action-btn" data-bs-toggle="dropdown" style="border-radius: 50%; width: 36px; height: 36px; border: 1px solid var(--border-color); background: var(--bg-card); color: var(--text-secondary); cursor: pointer; transition: all var(--transition-fast);"> <i class="fas fa-palette"></i> </button> <div class="dropdown-menu dropdown-menu-end" style="padding: 12px; min-width: 220px; background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border-color); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);"> <div class="theme-selector"> <button class="theme-option theme-default active" data-theme="default" onclick="setTheme('default')" title="Royal Blue" style="width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 50%; border: 2px solid var(--border-color); cursor: pointer; transition: all var(--transition-fast); background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2563EB, #1E40AF); padding: 0;"></button> <button class="theme-option theme-purple" data-theme="purple" onclick="setTheme('purple')" title="Royal Purple" style="width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 50%; border: 2px solid var(--border-color); cursor: pointer; transition: all var(--transition-fast); background: linear-gradient(135deg, #7C3AED, #5B21B6); padding: 0;"></button> <button class="theme-option theme-slate" data-theme="slate" onclick="setTheme('slate')" title="Slate Grey" style="width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 50%; border: 2px solid var(--border-color); cursor: pointer; transition: all var(--transition-fast); background: linear-gradient(135deg, #475569, #334155); padding: 0;"></button> <button class="theme-option theme-white" data-theme="white" onclick="setTheme('white')" title="Pure White" style="width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 50%; border: 2px solid var(--border-color); cursor: pointer; transition: all var(--transition-fast); background: linear-gradient(135deg, #F8FAFC, #E2E8F0); padding: 0;"></button> <button class="theme-option theme-black" data-theme="black" onclick="setTheme('black')" title="Deep Black" style="width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 50%; border: 2px solid var(--border-color); cursor: pointer; transition: all var(--transition-fast); background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0F172A, #1E293B); padding: 0;"></button> </div> <hr style="margin: 8px 0; border-color: var(--border-color);"> <div class="d-flex justify-content-between" style="font-size: 0.6rem; color: var(--text-muted);"> <span>Light / Dark</span> <span>💡 Click to change</span> </div> </div> </div> <button class="action-btn" onclick="window.location.href='{{ url_for('new_sale') }}'"> <i class="fas fa-cart-plus"></i> </button> <button class="action-btn" id="notificationBtn"> <i class="fas fa-bell"></i> <span class="badge-dot" id="notificationCount">0</span> </button> {% if current_user.is_authenticated %} <div class="user-profile" onclick="window.location.href='{{ url_for('profile') }}'"> <img src="https://ui-avatars.com/api/?name={{ current_user.full_name or current_user.username }}&background=2563EB&color=fff&size=35" alt="User"> <div class="user-info"> <span class="name">{{ current_user.full_name or current_user.username }}</span> <span class="role">{{ current_user.role|title }}</span> </div> </div> {% else %} <div class="user-profile" onclick="window.location.href='{{ url_for('login') }}'"> <img src="https://ui-avatars.com/api/?name=Guest&background=2563EB&color=fff&size=35" alt="Guest"> <div class="user-info"> <span class="name">Guest</span> <span class="role">Visitor</span> </div> </div> {% endif %} </div> </nav> <div class="page-content"> {% with messages = get_flashed_messages(with_categories=true) %} {% if messages %} <div class="alert-container"> {% for category, message in messages %} <div class="alert alert-{{ category }} alert-dismissible fade show" role="alert"> <i class="fas fa-{% if category == 'success' %}check-circle{% elif category == 'danger' %}exclamation-circle{% elif category == 'warning' %}exclamation-triangle{% else %}info-circle{% endif %} me-2"></i> {{ message }} <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert"></button> </div> {% endfor %} </div> {% endif %} {% endwith %} {% block content %}{% endblock %} </div> </div> <!-- ===== FLOATING ACTION BUTTON ===== --> <div class="fab-container"> <button class="fab" id="fabToggle" data-tooltip="Quick Actions"> <i class="fas fa-plus"></i> </button> <div class="fab-actions"> <button class="fab-item" style="background: #2563EB;" onclick="window.location.href='{{ url_for('new_sale') }}'" data-tooltip="New Sale"> <i class="fas fa-cart-plus"></i> </button> <button class="fab-item" style="background: #0D9488;" onclick="window.location.href='{{ url_for('new_purchase') }}'" data-tooltip="New Purchase"> <i class="fas fa-truck"></i> </button> <button class="fab-item" style="background: #7C3AED;" onclick="window.location.href='{{ url_for('add_customer') }}'" data-tooltip="Add Customer"> <i class="fas fa-user-plus"></i> </button> <button class="fab-item" style="background: #D97706;" onclick="window.location.href='{{ url_for('new_photocopy') }}'" data-tooltip="New Photocopy"> <i class="fas fa-copy"></i> </button> </div> </div> <!-- ===== TOAST CONTAINER ===== --> <div class="toast-container" id="toastContainer"></div> <!-- ===== SCRIPTS ===== --> <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.0/dist/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js"></script> <script src="https://code.jquery.com/jquery-3.7.0.min.js"></script> <script src="https://cdn.datatables.net/1.13.6/js/jquery.dataTables.min.js"></script> <script src="https://cdn.datatables.net/1.13.6/js/dataTables.bootstrap5.min.js"></script> <script src="{{ url_for('static', filename='js/custom.js') }}"></script> <script> // ============================================ // PROGRESS BAR // ============================================ window.addEventListener('scroll', function() { const scrollTop = window.scrollY; const docHeight = document.documentElement.scrollHeight - window.innerHeight; const progress = (scrollTop / docHeight) * 100; const progressBar = document.getElementById('progressBar'); if (progressBar) { progressBar.style.width = progress + '%'; } }); // ============================================ // PARTICLES BACKGROUND - THEME BASED // ============================================ (function() { const canvas = document.getElementById('particlesCanvas'); if (!canvas) return; const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d'); let particles = []; const count = 80; let animationId = null; function getThemeColor() { const theme = document.documentElement.getAttribute('data-theme') || 'default'; const isDark = document.documentElement.getAttribute('data-bs-theme') === 'dark'; const colors = { 'default': { light: '37, 99, 235', dark: '96, 165, 250' }, 'purple': { light: '124, 58, 237', dark: '167, 139, 250' }, 'slate': { light: '71, 85, 105', dark: '148, 163, 184' }, 'white': { light: '248, 250, 252', dark: '226, 232, 240' }, 'black': { light: '15, 23, 42', dark: '51, 65, 85' } }; const colorSet = colors[theme] || colors['default']; return isDark ? colorSet.dark : colorSet.light; } function resize() { canvas.width = window.innerWidth; canvas.height = window.innerHeight; } window.addEventListener('resize', resize); resize(); class Particle { constructor() { this.x = Math.random() * canvas.width; this.y = Math.random() * canvas.height; this.size = Math.random() * 3 + 1; this.speedX = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.4; this.speedY = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.4; this.opacity = Math.random() * 0.35 + 0.1; } update() { this.x += this.speedX; this.y += this.speedY; if (this.x > canvas.width) this.x = 0; if (this.x < 0) this.x = canvas.width; if (this.y > canvas.height) this.y = 0; if (this.y < 0) this.y = canvas.height; } draw(color) { ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(this.x, this.y, this.size, 0, Math.PI * 2); ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(${color}, ${this.opacity})`; ctx.fill(); } } function initParticles() { particles = []; for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) { particles.push(new Particle()); } } initParticles(); function animate() { const color = getThemeColor(); ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height); particles.forEach(p => { p.update(); p.draw(color); }); animationId = requestAnimationFrame(animate); } animate(); const observer = new MutationObserver(function() { initParticles(); }); observer.observe(document.documentElement, { attributes: true, attributeFilter: ['data-theme', 'data-bs-theme'] }); window.addEventListener('beforeunload', function() { if (animationId) { cancelAnimationFrame(animationId); } observer.disconnect(); }); })(); // ============================================ // LIVE CLOCK // ============================================ function updateClock() { const now = new Date(); let hours = now.getHours(); let minutes = now.getMinutes(); let seconds = now.getSeconds(); const ampm = hours >= 12 ? 'PM' : 'AM'; hours = hours % 12 || 12; const timeStr = `${String(hours).padStart(2, '0')}:${String(minutes).padStart(2, '0')}:${String(seconds).padStart(2, '0')} ${ampm}`; const days = ['Sun', 'Mon', 'Tue', 'Wed', 'Thu', 'Fri', 'Sat']; const months = ['Jan', 'Feb', 'Mar', 'Apr', 'May', 'Jun', 'Jul', 'Aug', 'Sep', 'Oct', 'Nov', 'Dec']; const dateStr = `${days[now.getDay()]}, ${now.getDate()} ${months[now.getMonth()]} ${now.getFullYear()}`; const clockTime = document.getElementById('clockTime'); const clockDate = document.getElementById('clockDate'); if (clockTime) clockTime.textContent = timeStr; if (clockDate) clockDate.textContent = dateStr; } document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() { updateClock(); setInterval(updateClock, 1000); }); // ============================================ // UPDATE LOGO FUNCTION - FIXED // ============================================ function updateLogo(theme) { const logoImg = document.getElementById('sidebarLogo'); if (logoImg) { // Sirf dark, black, slate themes mein logo2 show karein // Baaki sab mein logo1 show karein if (theme === 'dark' || theme === 'black' || theme === 'slate') { logoImg.src = "{{ url_for('static', filename='img/logo2.png') }}"; logoImg.alt = "PrimeAccess Logo Dark"; } else { logoImg.src = "{{ url_for('static', filename='img/logo1.png') }}"; logoImg.alt = "PrimeAccess Logo Light"; } } } // ============================================ // GET CURRENT THEME - FIXED // ============================================ function getCurrentTheme() { // Pehle localStorage check karein let storedTheme = localStorage.getItem('theme'); if (storedTheme) return storedTheme; // Agar localStorage mein nahi toh data-theme se lein let colorTheme = document.documentElement.getAttribute('data-theme'); if (colorTheme) return colorTheme; // Agar data-theme nahi hai toh data-bs-theme se lein const htmlTheme = document.documentElement.getAttribute('data-bs-theme'); return htmlTheme || 'light'; } // ============================================ // GET LIGHT/DARK MODE (data-bs-theme) // ============================================ function getLightDarkMode() { return document.documentElement.getAttribute('data-bs-theme') || 'light'; } // ============================================ // THEME TOGGLE // ============================================ function toggleTheme() { const currentTheme = document.documentElement.getAttribute('data-bs-theme'); const newTheme = currentTheme === 'light' ? 'dark' : 'light'; document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-bs-theme', newTheme); // Logo update - current color theme ke hisaab se const colorTheme = getCurrentTheme(); updateLogo(colorTheme); const thumb = document.getElementById('themeThumb'); const icon = document.getElementById('themeIcon'); if (thumb && icon) { if (newTheme === 'dark') { thumb.parentElement.classList.add('dark'); icon.className = 'fas fa-sun'; } else { thumb.parentElement.classList.remove('dark'); icon.className = 'fas fa-moon'; } } fetch('/api/theme/' + newTheme) .then(response => response.json()) .then(data => console.log('Theme updated:', data)) .catch(err => console.log('Theme saved locally')); } // ============================================ // THEME SELECTOR // ============================================ function setTheme(theme) { document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', theme);
The document content is too long to display in full

One more step before you proceed...
